message:
🐛 Fix D-pad focus for EPG guide, sidebar initial focus, and provider cards (#56)

- Wrap EPG guide channel rows in Focus widget with onKeyEvent for
  SELECT/ENTER (play) and LEFT (return to sidebar)
- Add visual focus indicator (purple highlight + left border) to guide rows
- Add autofocus on selected sidebar item for Android TV so first D-pad
  press works correctly
- Wrap _ProviderCard in Focus+Builder with purple border focus indicator
  and SELECT/ENTER to refresh provider

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
